chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3400 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.16319/2019. 2. For hearing of main case. 16.04.2025 Mr. Mustafa Mamdani, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Khalid Rajpar, advocate for the respondents No.2, 3, 5 & 6. Miss Afsheen Aman, advocate for the respondent No.4. Learned counsel submits under instructions that notice has been impugned herein, however, the same shall be contested before the issuing authority. He seeks that same be adjudicated vide speaking order after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending aforesaid no coercive action be taken there against. Learned counsel for the respondents articulate no cavil to the aforesaid and state that petition may be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
